steps.title: Find the context for estimation
steps.content: The narrator writes “a safe guess would have placed him somewhere in the debatable ground between forty and fifty.” The phrase is fundamentally about positioning someone at a particular point on an age scale.

steps.title: Match the word to age estimation
steps.content: Estimated fits: to position someone at a particular estimate based on observation. The other three—contracted, adapted, arranged—don't relate to age judgment. That matches choice A — A is correct.
